- [ ] 🧪 Tests (adding or updating tests)
- [ ] 🔧 Chore (maintenance, dependencies, configs)
- [ ] 💚 CI/CD (changes to CI/CD workflows)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
